commands: sudo su - ubuntu -c 'pm2 delete mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge 2>/dev/null; cd /opt/MBUTOMS/whatsapp-bridge && pm2 start index.js --name mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge && pm2 save'

sudo su - ubuntu -c 'pm2 jlist' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d||'[]');const p=j.find(x=>x.name==='mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge');console.log('PM2 status:',p?.pm2_env?.status);});"
